title: Krieg Tightens His Grip on the Baratie
description: On pages 5–8, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And that method's written down in his travel log for sure!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There might even be information on one piece in his log as well!

dialogue.speaker: Krieg Pirate
dialogue.text: As expected from our Don Krieg!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So that's how it was!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Be walk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All we gotta do is get our hands on that log,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And all the treasures of this world are ours for the taking!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Alright, you bastards! Let's take over that restaurant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Woah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're all fired up to fight too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey old man! It's a promise, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You don't have to ask me twice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My restaurant would become a wreck if I let you work here for a full year anyways.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Where's Patty and Carne?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: They're busy with the Battle Preparations!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Those guys sure are reliable in times like these!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: only in times like these... you better go to the control room and open up the "Fins."

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: What.. You sure!? That'll just give our enemies a foothold...!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: doesn't matter.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: The geezer won't shut up if we fight inside the restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: You say something, brat?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Yeah, I said you won't shut up.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: on it right away!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hand that ship to us, you pathetic cooks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's get things started!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rocket!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Aghh! He's flyin' right towards us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: followed by...!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Ugh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Ahh!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Gah!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
